svg.title: Cassiope microservices architecture diagram
svg.desc: Docker Compose environment containing Eureka Server, Config Server, three microservices (Accounts, Cards, Loans), and a PostgreSQL database

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Config Server in this architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Eureka Server in this architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Accounts microservice')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Cards microservice')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Loans microservice')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PostgreSQL database setup')
